untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of continuation pattern formation high and trend-line boundary, which are pattern-specific structural levels not available as standard indicators. The source text references 'closed outside the trend-line boundary or the formation high, whichever was lower' — this requires pattern recognition logic and dynamic reference level calculation beyond the allowed indicator set. Trendline and formation high detection would need custom pattern detection code not expressible with the allowed indicators (sma, ema, rsi, atr, bb, macd, adx, stoch, donchian, pivots, volume, price position).
translation_notes: Entry approximated using close > pivot as a proxy for breakout above formation level. Exit uses -36% return threshold from bull market decline parameter. The core pattern recognition requirement (identifying continuation formations and their boundaries) cannot be translated to standard technical indicators.
